sentences.target: Ich denke oft an die Zukunft.

translations.de: Ich denke oft an die Zukunft.
translations.en: I often think about the future.
translations.es: A menudo pienso en el futuro.
translations.vi: Tôi thường nghĩ về tương lai.
translations.nl: Ik denk vaak aan de toekomst.
translations.hi: मैं अक्सर भविष्य के बारे में सोचती हूँ.
translations.ja: よく将来のことを考える。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb.
Preposition governing accusative, introducing a PP.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative, determiner of the noun.
Common noun (feminine), object of the preposition ‘an’.

sentences.target: In Zukunft spare ich jeden Monat.

translations.de: In Zukunft spare ich jeden Monat.
translations.en: In the future, I’ll save every month.
translations.es: A partir de ahora voy a ahorrar cada mes.
translations.fr: À l’avenir, je vais mettre de l’argent de côté tous les mois.
translations.it: D’ora in poi metterò da parte soldi ogni mese.
translations.zh-Hans: 以后我每个月都会存钱。
translations.yue: 以後我每個月都會儲錢。
translations.ru: В будущем я буду откладывать деньги каждый месяц.
translations.pt: A partir de agora vou poupar todos os meses.
translations.he: מהיום והלאה אחסוך כסף כל חודש.
translations.vi: Từ giờ tôi sẽ tiết kiệm mỗi tháng.
translations.ar: من الآن فصاعدًا سأدّخر كل شهر.
translations.nl: Vanaf nu ga ik elke maand sparen.
translations.hi: अब से मैं हर महीने बचत करूँगा.
translations.pl: Od teraz będę odkładać pieniądze co miesiąc.
translations.el: Από εδώ και πέρα θα βάζω στην άκρη κάθε μήνα.
translations.nb: Fra nå av skal jeg spare hver måned.
translations.id: Mulai sekarang aku akan menabung tiap bulan.
translations.sv: Från och med nu ska jag spara varje månad.
translations.ro: De acum înainte voi economisi în fiecare lună.
translations.cs: Odteď si budu každý měsíc spořit.
translations.da: Fra nu af vil jeg spare hver måned.
translations.ja: これからは毎月貯金する。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a temporal PP; typically governs dative in this phrase.
Common noun used as a bare temporal complement to the preposition.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular.
Personal pronoun in nominative functioning as the subject.
Quantifying determiner, masculine singular accusative, modifying ‘Monat’ in a temporal accusative NP.
Common noun, head of the temporal NP ‘jeden Monat’ functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Sie macht sich Sorgen um ihre Zukunft.
sentences.reading: /ziː maxt zɪç ˈzɔʁɡən ʊm ˈiːʁə ˈtsuːkʊnft/

translations.de: Sie macht sich Sorgen um ihre Zukunft.
translations.ipa: /ziː maxt zɪç ˈzɔʁɡən ʊm ˈiːʁə ˈtsuːkʊnft/
translations.es: Ella se preocupa por su futuro.
translations.it: Si preoccupa per il suo futuro.
translations.pt: Ela se preocupa com o futuro dela.
translations.vi: Cô ấy lo cho tương lai của mình.
translations.nl: Ze maakt zich zorgen over haar toekomst.
translations.hi: वह अपने भविष्य को लेकर चिंतित है.
translations.nb: Hun bekymrer seg for fremtiden sin.
translations.sv: Hon oroar sig för sin framtid.
translations.ro: Ea își face griji pentru viitorul ei.
translations.cs: Dělá si starosti o svou budoucnost.
translations.da: Hun bekymrer sig for sin fremtid.
translations.ja: 彼女は自分の将来を心配している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular, forming a light-verb construction.
Reflexive pronoun (accusative) required by the construction ‘sich Sorgen machen’.
Plural common noun acting as the internal object of the light verb ‘machen’.
Preposition governing accusative, introducing the topic of concern.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular accusative, modifying ‘Zukunft’.
Common noun (feminine), object of the preposition ‘um’.

sentences.target: Wir reden über die Zukunft beim Abendessen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʁeːdən ˈyːbɐ diː ˈtsuːkʊnft baɪm ˈaːbəntˌɛsən/

translations.de: Wir reden über die Zukunft beim Abendessen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʁeːdən ˈyːbɐ diː ˈtsuːkʊnft baɪm ˈaːbəntˌɛsən/
translations.en: We talk about the future at dinner.
translations.es: Hablamos del futuro durante la cena.
translations.fr: On parle de l’avenir pendant le dîner.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在吃晚饭时聊未来。
translations.yue: 我哋食晚飯嗰陣會傾將來。
translations.ru: За ужином мы говорим о будущем.
translations.pt: Falamos sobre o futuro no jantar.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים על העתיד בארוחת הערב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nói về tương lai trong bữa tối.
translations.nl: Tijdens het avondeten praten we over de toekomst.
translations.uk: За вечерею ми говоримо про майбутнє.
translations.hi: रात के खाने के दौरान हम भविष्य के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.el: Στο δείπνο μιλάμε για το μέλλον.
translations.nb: Under middagen snakker vi om fremtiden.
translations.id: Saat makan malam kami membicarakan masa depan.
translations.sv: Under middagen pratar vi om framtiden.
translations.da: Til aftensmad taler vi om fremtiden.
translations.ja: 夕食のときに将来のことを話す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural.
Preposition governing accusative, introducing the topic.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative, determiner of the noun.
Common noun (feminine), object of the preposition ‘über’.
Prepositional contraction of ‘bei dem’; governs dative to mark location/time setting.
Common noun in dative (licensed by ‘bei’), functioning as an adverbial PP meaning ‘during/at dinner’.

jp: Ich denke oft an die Zukunft.
In Zukunft spare ich jeden Monat.
Sie macht sich Sorgen um ihre Zukunft.
Wir reden über die Zukunft beim Abendessen.
fu: /ziː maxt zɪç ˈzɔʁɡən ʊm ˈiːʁə ˈtsuːkʊnft/

de: Ich denke oft an die Zukunft.
In Zukunft spare ich jeden Monat.
Sie macht sich Sorgen um ihre Zukunft.
Wir reden über die Zukunft beim Abendessen.

en: I often think about the future.
In the future, I’ll save every month.
We talk about the future at dinner.
